seoTitle: Fairlight vs Fairy Hill — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Fairlight and Fairy Hill. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Fairlight vs Fairy Hill: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Fairlight and Fairy Hill.
heading: Fairlight vs Fairy Hill — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Fairlight, New South Wales and Fairy Hill, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Fairy Hill has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Fairlight (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Fairlight or Fairy Hill safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Fairlight has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Fairy Hill scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Fairlight scores 37/100 for bushfire risk. Fairy Hill scores 51/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Fairlight or Fairy Hill?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Fairy Hill has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
